findings.detail: Server returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * — any origin can read responses.
findings.evidence: ACAO: *
findings.remediation: Restrict ACAO to a specific trusted origin. Never use wildcard when credentials are involved.

findings.detail: CSP prevents XSS and data injection attacks by controlling allowed resource sources.
findings.evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add a strict CSP: 'default-src \'self\'; script-src \'self\'; object-src \'none\';'

findings.detail: HSTS forces HTTPS connections and prevents SSL-stripping attacks.
findings.evidence: Header 'Strict-Transport-Security' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload

findings.detail: Missing Referrer-Policy may leak sensitive URL information to third parties.
findings.evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

findings.detail: Missing Permissions-Policy allows access to powerful browser APIs (camera, mic, etc.).
findings.evidence: Header 'Permissions-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()

findings.detail: Missing COOP allows cross-origin pages to access window references.
findings.evidence: Header 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin

findings.detail: Missing CORP allows cross-origin pages to load this site's resources.
findings.evidence: Header 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy' not present in response
findings.remediation: Add: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin

findings.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS' lacks HttpOnly flag — readable by JavaScript, enabling XSS-based session theft.
findings.evidence: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS=... (no HttpOnly)
findings.remediation: Set HttpOnly attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS=...; HttpOnly

findings.detail: Possible base64-encoded data detected in cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS' value.
findings.evidence: ApplicationGatewayAffinityCORS=6c9ff38cd4c599764ea1796096cc2732
findings.remediation: Never store sensitive data directly in cookie values. Use server-side sessions.

findings.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' lacks HttpOnly flag — readable by JavaScript, enabling XSS-based session theft.
findings.evidence: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=... (no HttpOnly)
findings.remediation: Set HttpOnly attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; HttpOnly

findings.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' lacks Secure flag — transmitted over HTTP, vulnerable to interception.
findings.evidence: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=... (no Secure)
findings.remediation: Set Secure attribute: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; Secure

findings.detail: Cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' has no SameSite attribute — CSRF attacks may succeed.
findings.evidence: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=... (no SameSite)
findings.remediation: Add SameSite=Lax or SameSite=Strict: Set-Cookie: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=...; SameSite=Strict

findings.detail: Possible base64-encoded data detected in cookie 'ApplicationGatewayAffinity' value.
findings.evidence: ApplicationGatewayAffinity=6c9ff38cd4c599764ea1796096cc2732
findings.remediation: Never store sensitive data directly in cookie values. Use server-side sessions.

findings.type: Business Logic / State Machine Flaw (Requires Manual Verification)
findings.detail: Application may allow negative quantities, bypassing payment workflows, or fractional cent manipulation. Run State-Machine fuzzing on cart endpoints.
findings.evidence: Automated logic heuristics flag /checkout and /cart paths.
findings.remediation: Enforce strict server-side state machines. Do not trust client-side prices. Validate all quantities to be > 0 and integers.
